data.title: Monad Testnet Addresses Surpass 30 Million Milestone
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Monad Explorer reveals that the total number of addresses on the Monad testnet has exceeded 30 million, reaching 30,865,754 addresses at the time of reporting. In the past 24 hours, approximately 3.81 million new addresses have been added. Previously, Foresight News reported that the Monad testnet was launched on February 19.

data.title: “ETH High Winning Rate Band Whale” Increases Holdings of HYPE by $3.18 Million in Hyperliquid
IBIT token price exceeded 1.51 USDT after launch, with the highest increase of 1797%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, IBIT tokens were listed on the spot trading section of the IBIT.global platform, with the highest price reaching 1.51 USDT, and the highest increase of 1797%.
It is reported that IBIT is the platform currency of the encrypted platform IBIT, which is mainly produced through IBIT node mining. Holders can participate in LaunchPool staking mining, participate in LaunchPad potential projects, deduct platform fees and other ecological rights.

data.title: BTC/USDT,ETH/USDT and XRP/USDT Lead Binance USD-M Perpetual Futures Market in Trading Volume Over the Past 24 Hours
data.description: According to Binance Futures data, over the past 24 hours, the BTC/USDT, ETH/USDT, XRP/USDT, SOL/USDT and 1000PEPE/USDT trading pairs led the USD-M perpetual futures market in trading volume. BTC/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 1.05, funding rate: 0.0043%.ETH/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 2.22 , funding rate: -0.0005%.XRP/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 1.78, funding rate: -0.0035%.SOL/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 2.69, funding rate: 0.0100%.1000PEPE/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 2.23, funding rate: -0.0008%.

data.title: Bitcoin Surges as Fed Signals Policy Shift
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the recent FOMC meeting provided a significant boost to the market, propelling Bitcoin's price beyond $85,000. The Federal Reserve announced plans to reduce its 'quantitative tightening' strategy starting in April, which the market interpreted as an indirect rate cut. This has strengthened expectations that the Fed might begin easing policies as early as June. As of now, the market anticipates three rate cuts in 2025, scheduled for June, September, and December.

Despite the current optimism, the Fed's tone remains cautious. Policymakers have lowered the economic growth forecast to 1.7%, a reduction of 0.4 percentage points, while raising the inflation expectation to 2.8%, indicating rising stagflation risks. Additionally, the Fed's dot plot reveals a more hawkish stance compared to December last year, with an increase in the number of officials not expecting rate cuts in 2025 to four.

In the options market, positioning has normalized, with skew shifting back towards call options. This marks a contrast to earlier in the week when skew favored put options. The key test will occur when the U.S. market opens tonight.

data.title: Missouri Bitcoin Reserve Bill Advances to Committee Stage
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the Missouri Bitcoin Reserve Bill, HB1217, has been submitted to the House Special Committee on Governmental Affairs. This bill, part of the state-level Strategic Bitcoin Reserve (SBR) initiatives, has progressed to the committee stage six weeks after its introduction.

Previously reported by BlockBeats, Missouri State Representative Ben Keathley introduced Bill 1217 on February 7. The proposal aims to establish a strategic Bitcoin reserve fund to diversify the state's investment portfolio. If enacted, the bill would permit the Missouri State Treasurer to receive, invest, and hold Bitcoin under specific circumstances.

data.title: Coinbase International has launched REZ, GRASS, and RARE perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official announcement, Coinbase International Exchange and Coinbase Advanced have launched REZ, GRASS, and RARE perpetual contracts.

data.title: Lazarus Group transferred out 12.9 BTC, and the number of BTC held dropped to 13,440
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Arkham data, the North Korean hacker group Lazarus Group transferred 12,929 BTC to bc1qm7zgdmpktrm57n4p2y936daqhsk0tq0lakl82l 27 minutes ago. The latest data shows that the number of BTC held by Lazarus Group has dropped to 13,440, worth about US$1.16 billion.

data.title: Trust Wallet launches zero transaction fee offer for BNB Chain, but users still need to pay gas fees
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Trust Wallet issued a statement saying that from 17:00 on March 20, 2025 to 16:00 on March 27 (UTC+8), all token transactions on BNB will be exempt from transaction provider fees. This offer is supported by 1inch and 0x. Users still need to pay network/gas fees, but transaction provider fees will be completely waived. This event only applies to transactions conducted through the transaction function within the Trust Wallet application, and third-party dApp transactions are not eligible.

data.title: Missouri Bitcoin Reserve Bill Enters Committee Stage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to Bitcoin Laws, the Missouri Bitcoin Reserve Bill HB1217 has been submitted to the House Special Committee on Intergovernmental Affairs. This is one of the slower-moving state-level strategic bitcoin reserve (SBR) bills and has now entered the committee stage six weeks after its introduction.
